title: Art heist in Italy: Masterpieces worth millions stolen from museum in three minutes
summary_full: Thieves have stolen three priceless paintings from the Magnani Rocca Foundation near Parma. The artworks by Renoir, Cezanne, and Matisse were taken overnight. Police suspect an organized group was behind the swift burglary. The incident follows a series of high-profile art thefts across Europe. Experts suggest such thefts may be linked to ransom demands.
